title: ESSALOO Pen Creator Studio, Make Your Own Pens & Pen Making Kit for Kids, Creative Art and Craft Kits with 100+ Accessories (20 Pens)
features: Plenty of Accessories - The pen making kit for kids contains 20 pens (including 60 refills), two pen holders, 6 funnels, 6 spoons, 25 types of sequins, the rich accessories bring unlimited surprise creativity, make your own pen.

Make Your Own Pens- We have carefully selected 20 different styles of pen caps and 25 types of sequins, allowing up to 20 children to craft simultaneously. As kids' party favours, each child can create their own unique glitter pens for kids, making it perfect for birthday party bag toys/party bag fillers/classroom art projects/other occasions.

Arts and Crafts for Kids - Kids craft activities help improve children's hands-on skills, nurture their imagination and creativity, and cultivate focus and perseverance. The pen making kit provides fun kids craft activities for kids and engaging crafting experience, boosting their sense of self-worth while also promoting parent-child bonding and interaction.

Creative Gifts for Party - Glitter, beautiful packaging and a wide range of accessories make the make your own pen set an ideal presents for girls aged 6-10. If you’re looking for a unique gift that will entertain and inspire, this is it!

Glitter pen making kit made of Safe Material - The craft kits for kids includes 20 gel pens. The pen body is made of plastic, and the refill offers smooth writing, quick drying, and vibrant ink flow, ensuring clean writing without smudging.
